name: heygen
description: Create and manage AI videos and avatars

interface.shortDescription: Create and manage AI videos and avatars
interface.longDescription: HeyGen lets users create, inspect, update, and manage AI videos, avatars, voices, video translations, lipsync jobs, and Video Agent sessions from ChatGPT using their authenticated HeyGen account.
defaultPrompt: Create my HeyGen avatar from a written description
Make a 30-second intro video of myself
Send a video update to my team about this week's progress
